candidate.completion: put me in your group chat so I can finally be left on read by multiple people.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in your group chat so I can finally be left on read by multiple people.

evaluation.rationale: Clean reversal: a plea for connection flips into a wish for larger-scale neglect. The group-chat idea is specific and contemporary, but the ending is a bit long and less polished than its core joke.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
